title: Kratom alkaloids could treat HER2+ breast cancer & help with pain!
body:
Kratom, a plant grown in Southeast Asia that is a relative of the coffee plant, contains over 40 alkaloids that have medicinal properties. Recently, researchers found that 7-OH and mitragynine from the kratom plant could work on HER2+ breast cancer and preclinical and clinical trials should follow.

15 million people already use kratom and 7-OH products in the United States, most of them for chronic pain. This is really exciting news.

[https://www.pharmacytimes.com/view/natural-alkaloids-from-mitragyna-speciosa-show-potential-as-novel-her2-inhibitors-in-breast-cancer?utm\_source=www.pharmacytimes.com&utm\_medium=relatedContent](https://www.pharmacytimes.com/view/natural-alkaloids-from-mitragyna-speciosa-show-potential-as-novel-her2-inhibitors-in-breast-cancer?utm_source=www.pharmacytimes.com&utm_medium=relatedContent)
